project: RoSuM - 5G-enabled Road Surface Marking and Traffic Sign Localization, Quality Inspection, and Regular Passportization
title: RoSuM - Lokalizace vodorovneho a svisleho dopravniho znaceni, kontrola kvality a pravidelna pasportizace s podporou 5G

metadata.agency: Technology Agency of the Czech Republic
metadata.program: 8. verejna soutez - Program prumysloveho vyzkumu a experimentalniho vyvoje TREND

english_title.label: English title
english_title.text: RoSuM - 5G-enabled Road Surface Marking and Traffic Sign Localization, Quality Inspection, and Regular Passportization

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: 5G technology; visual inspection; data collection; artificial intelligence; software

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The aim of the project is to create a system for automated visual inspection of the condition of the road, road markings, traffic equipment and other assets of the road administrator. The system will use continuous data collection using smart camera devices for fast fault detection, and these will be clearly reported to the administrator of the communications. The system will utilize modern machine learning methods and advanced localization algorithms that allow the manufacturing of cheaper and more usable equipment than currently available on the market. The overall system will consist of a smart camera, software using artificial intelligence and existing map data for in-camera data selection, and a cloud system for final evaluation and reporting of communication defects and changes.
